reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros súper cordiales y atentos todos siempre.
Y el lugar justo en una esquina que se puede ingresar por un lado y por el otro.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were all incredibly friendly and attentive.

And the location is perfect, right on a corner with entrances from both sides.

reviews.comment:
Pertenece al ACA, generalmente esta muy concurrida y en estos momentos que estan haciendo reparaciones se complica un poco, pero estan bien organizados, por otro lado los sanitarios son de los mas límpios, tanto hombres como mujeres.

(Translated by Google)
It belongs to the ACA, it's usually very busy and right now because they're doing repairs it's a bit complicated, but they're well organized, on the other hand the restrooms are among the cleanest, both men's and women's.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSaDRHMGJ3EAE
